prose:
**Formaldehyde frontier-orbital energies** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-provided at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz`; this was a single point calculation at that geometry. SCF converged in 8 cycles.

The HOMO energy is -7.6523 eV.
The LUMO energy is -1.7826 eV.
The HOMO-LUMO gap is 5.8696712 eV.

This calculation is trustworthy.
